title: berkheya coddii
intro: Berkheya coddii, also known as the yellow daisy or yellow marguerite, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family that is native to the Western Cape Province of South Africa. The medicinal properties of Berkheya coddii include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive problems. Berkheya coddii can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in traditional medicine to create various remedies.
